title: EDGE Chill and Fun
description: A modpack for a community server. Built to experience chill and slow gameplay for casuals.
body:
This modpack is built for EDGE community server, but you can use it for your own community too!

## What is the purpose of this pack?

The aim of this pack is to make a **chill, slow-life gameplay for casuals**, but can also be challenging during group plays.

To achieve that, we utilize Bare Bones and almost every mods out there that shifts Minecraft's design to look similar to the trailer. Then we add various mods that brings RPG-like gameplay such as Simply Skills, Spell Engine mods, MC Dungeons mods, and so on.

The wilderness' fauna is made more livelier using various animal mods.
Farming mods and decoration mods are added to lift the medieval atmosphere, making them brighter and colorful.

Emeralds are not really fun in the late game. Therefore, we added Numismatic Overhaul and Bountiful Boards. They implement currency system that you can get from trades, killing illagers, structure explorations, and from bounties.

## Do you have specific goals to be expected from players when playing this pack?

Yes! We hope players can play with their friends in server, find a place to settle, build very cozy medieval house with aesthetic farms. Expand the base further into towns, along with villagers. Engage against invading hostile mobs as players expand their town, while also training themself to become more powerful with the improved combat system.

## Credits
This modpack is possible to create with the efforts of each mod, shader, and resource pack authors. Big thanks to them.

External mods:
- [MC Dungeons Artifacts by chronos_sacaria](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mcdar)
